currentTask.title: INFRAVIZ — Terraform Infrastructure Modules
currentTask.lastStepCompleted: Session 2: Reconciled agent-status.json + requirement.json to reflect DONE state from session 1. All 8 Terraform modules confirmed on filesystem.

completedTasks: Infrastructure analysis for INFRAVIZ posted to group-chat
iam module (Lambda exec role + Anthropic API key + S3 + Secrets + SSM policies)
lambda module (Python 3.11 + Mangum + Anthropic env var + VPC optional)
api_gateway module (HTTP API v2 + Lambda integration + CORS)
s3_frontend module (React static site + OAC bucket policy)
cloudfront module (HTTPS CDN + SPA routing + OAC)
secrets_manager module (Anthropic API key + app config)
Root infra/main.tf + variables.tf + outputs.tf wiring all modules
Session 2: Fixed agent-status.json vikram entry to status=done
Session 2: Updated requirement.json agentInputs.vikram to received=true
keyDecisions: Anthropic API direct for Claude (Bedrock deferred Sprint-02) — per Arjun decision 09:20
HTTP API Gateway v2 (not REST) — lower cost, simpler Lambda proxy for FastAPI
Aurora Serverless v2 — auto-scales for demo workloads, cost-efficient for Sprint-01
No VPC for Lambda in dev — simpler, public endpoints OK per Arjun
OAC (Origin Access Control) for CloudFront+S3 — modern replacement for OAI
RDS manages DB master password via Secrets Manager (manage_master_user_password = true)
backend_state module must be applied FIRST before any other module
S3 for state file storage, only metadata pointer in DB (not full JSONB)
pendingNextSteps: Run terraform fmt on all modules (needs Terraform CLI)
Run terraform validate on all modules (needs AWS credentials + CLI)
Hand off aurora_endpoint and master_user_secret_arn to Rasool for migration runs
Hand off api_endpoint to Kiran for FastAPI integration tests
Hand off frontend_bucket_name and cloudfront_distribution_id to Rohan for CI/CD

dependenciesStatus.readyToUnblock: Rasool (aurora endpoint), Kiran (api_endpoint + lambda outputs), Rohan (frontend_bucket + cloudfront)
